name: Sushiswap V2 Trading
description: Execute optimal swaps on Sushiswap V2 (Ethereum mainnet) — the classic constant-product AMM. Covers route building (single-hop vs WETH-bridge), slippage protection, and deadline enforcement.

steps.description: Call getAmountsOut for [tokenIn, tokenOut] and [tokenIn, WETH, tokenOut]; pick the path with higher amountOut.
